rationale: No direct conflict. Educ. Code §38.0031 governs a dyslexia classroom technology plan; the proposed homestead exemption increase under Tax Code §11.13(b) does not alter any operative text or requirements of this section.
quote: The agency shall establish a committee to develop a plan for integrating technology into the classroom to help accommodate students with dyslexia.
_note: Indirect fiscal pressure on school district budgets referenced in §38.0031(a)(1) is possible but does not constitute a statutory conflict.
